items: Synthetic module price checks showed a 3.5% week-over-week decline in selected spot-market channels, bringing the benchmark module price to $0.28/watt.
Synthetic battery storage system quotes remained broadly stable at $140 per kWh for benchmark 4-hour duration project assumptions.
Lithium carbonate spot pricing fell to $18,500 per tonne, down from $20,100 at the start of May, reflecting improved supply conditions.
Inverter shipment volumes from top-5 manufacturers increased 15% year-over-year in Q1 2026, according to synthetic industry data.
